stories.validation_summary: Source registry baseline now uses validated source entries with compliance and refresh contracts.
evidence: runtime source agent reads registry_snapshot and enabled_sources

stories.validation_summary: RawNewsItem and NormalizedNewsItem schemas are defined and validated by runtime normalize flow.
Event/compliance contract is encoded in compliance rules and final gate artifacts.
Traceability and gate registry now map Sprint 0 goals, stories, and manual review gates.
Runtime graph and runtime schedule now expose structured source/compliance/normalize/audit outputs.
evidence: workflows/runtime_schedule.py runs source_runtime -> compliance_guard -> normalize -> source_audit

stories.validation_summary: Manual correction records and final gate artifacts are available for human intervention.
Source runtime now fetches latest public content from CLS telegraph and Jiuyangongshe live pages.
evidence: skills/fetch/client.py implements cls_telegraph_html and jiuyangongshe_live_html connectors
tools/run_live_event_cognition.py runs live fetch against public pages

stories.validation_summary: Normalize stage now cleans text, drops low-signal posts, and deduplicates repeated items.
evidence: skills/normalize/formatter.py assigns quality_score, dedup_key, and filter_reasons

stories.validation_summary: Normalized news is converted into traceable event objects with source and evidence references.
evidence: packages/schema/models.py EventObject now supports runtime event cognition fields

stories.validation_summary: Candidate events are unified into canonical events while preserving source and evidence chains.
evidence: skills/event/engine.py unify_events merges source_refs and evidence_refs

stories.validation_summary: Canonical events now receive rule-based theme tags with explicit evidence.
Events are classified into catalyst types and strengths using objective rule sets.
Events now carry direct and weak stock/sector/theme linkages for downstream ranking and display.
evidence: skills/event/engine.py extracts symbol and sector candidates from metadata and text

stories.validation_summary: Events are ranked for the user by freshness, catalyst strength, theme overlap, and asset linkage.
Runtime now outputs today focus cards, watchlist event cards, and a daily review report with risk notice.
evidence: agents/runtime/daily_review/agent.py emits today_focus_page, watchlist_event_page, and daily_review_report

stories.validation_summary: Catalyst candidate extraction is now represented by theme candidate aggregation inputs built from canonical events and linkage evidence.
evidence: tests/integration/test_event_cognition_runtime.py validates theme candidate generation from live-like inputs

stories.validation_summary: Catalyst typing remains explicit and continues to feed the downstream theme candidate and fermentation pipeline.
evidence: skills/event/fermentation.py consumes catalyst_type in structured result synthesis

stories.validation_summary: Catalyst strength and timeliness are now folded into structured cards and theme heat scoring.
Multiple event signals are now aggregated into theme candidates with supporting evidence chains.
evidence: theme_candidates retain supporting_signals, source_refs, evidence_refs, and linked_assets

stories.validation_summary: Theme candidates retain objective linkage to stocks, sectors, and theme assets for downstream consumption.
evidence: agents/runtime/stock_linkage/agent.py injects theme, stock, and sector assets
skills/event/fermentation.py carries linked_assets into cards and feeds

stories.validation_summary: Structured catalyst result cards are now generated as stable intermediate outputs with evidence and risk notice.
evidence: structured cards include catalyst_summary, strength_level, timeliness_level, and risk_notice

stories.validation_summary: Structured runtime outputs are now persisted into a real result warehouse under workspace/artifacts/runtime/{run_id}.
evidence: agents/runtime/result_warehouse/agent.py writes raw, normalized, canonical, theme_candidates, and structured_result_cards

stories.validation_summary: Theme heat snapshots and fermentation scores are now generated with score breakdown and stage classification.
evidence: skills/event/fermentation.py computes velocity_score, acceleration_score, and theme_heat_score

stories.validation_summary: A fermenting theme candidate feed is now produced as the direct output of the fermentation engine.
evidence: tools/run_live_event_cognition.py now prints fermenting_theme_feed together with daily review and artifact batch dir

stories.validation_summary: Theme candidates now carry core narrative, first/latest seen timestamps, source/evidence chain, and low-consensus cluster fields for early theme discovery.
evidence: skills/event/fermentation.py aggregates cluster_id, core_narrative, first_seen_time, latest_seen_time, heat_score, catalyst_score, continuity_score, and fermentation_score
tests/integration/test_event_cognition_runtime.py validates core_narrative and theme candidate cluster generation

stories.validation_summary: Candidate stock mapping now exposes purity scoring, score breakdown, evidence, and risk flags for theme-stock fit evaluation.
evidence: skills/event/engine.py build_candidate_stock_links outputs candidate_purity_score, purity_breakdown, evidence, and risk_flags
skills/event/fermentation.py aggregates candidate_stocks for downstream ranking and research cards

stories.validation_summary: Low-position research priority scoring is now generated from catalyst, continuity, purity, fermentation, timeliness, and stage signals.
evidence: skills/event/fermentation.py builds low_position_opportunities with low_position_score, entry_stage, timeliness_level, low_position_reason, and risk_notice

stories.validation_summary: Baseline low-position research cards now flow into daily review outputs with narrative, evidence, candidate stocks, and research-only risk notice.
evidence: skills/event/fermentation.py composes research-card fields for low-position opportunities and daily review
tests/integration/test_event_cognition_runtime.py validates daily_review low_position_candidates and research-only notice
